name: unsupported_doc_citation
description: Pins the cite-verifier (engine/validator.py:470-485 _verify_cites) AND the retry-exhaustion abstain path. Each queued proposal cites USD00055555 in the narrative, but the tagged evidence only mentions USD00077777 — a hallucinated doc number that vanilla prompting cannot reliably prevent. classify_narrative returns COMPLIANCE_AFFIRMING (has 'examined ' / 'confirmed via' / 'documented in') so the status match passes; the literal cite check then fires UNSUPPORTED_DOC_CITATION because USD00055555 does not appear in evidence_text. Row's own cci_id is exempted via _CITE_EXEMPT_SUBSTRINGS so the exemption does not mask the hallucinated USD. Three attempts exhaust the retry budget → _abstain with reason 'validator-exhausted: ... unsupported_doc_citation ...'. Hallucinated cite is the second leg of precision-over-recall (future_tense is leg one); both legs need a frozen case so a regression in _verify_cites token extraction (the SV-/CCI-/USD/control-ID regex set) surfaces here before it ships a fake citation past a 3PAO.

ccis_row.guidance: The organization requires approvals by organization-defined personnel or roles for requests to create information system accounts.

tagged_evidence:
## Tagged evidence
- USD00077777 Example System Access Control Plan Rev A — describes the account-request approval workflow and the designated approvers.
